title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Samsung India Electronics Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Samsung India Electronics Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Samsung India Electronics Capital India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Samsung India Electronics Capital India:
Samsung India Electronics Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics Capital India!
